prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of LLY stock, I applied typical short-term volatility patterns for large pharmaceutical stocks. LLY has an implied volatility around 25-30% annually, which translates to roughly 1.6% daily volatility. The point estimate assumes no directional bias for the single day. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with the daily volatility estimate, where 50% CI covers ±0.67 standard deviations, 80% CI covers ±1.28 standard deviations, and 90% CI covers ±1.64 standard deviations from the current price.
